zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Polly Lineberger於1535年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，她的父親Johann Michael Linberger48歲，母親Lady Eve Willis45歲。她與John James Rankin結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年在她的家鄉享年105歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lineberger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German and German Leuenberger or of its Alsatian cognate Leyenberger. Compare Linebarger , Lineberry , and Lionberger .

variants.name: Leuenberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Niklaus, Urs, Joerg, Kurt.
Swiss German and German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leuenberg, as for example one in Brandenburg, Germany, named with   Leu   (‘lion’) as the first element.

variants.name: Lineberry
meanings: Variant of   Lineberger   1, a surname of (Swiss) German or Alsatian origin.

variants.name: Linebarger
meanings: Variant of   Lineberger   1, a surname of (Swiss) German or Alsatian origin.

variants.name: Lionberger
meanings: Americanized form of German Löwenberger: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Löwenberg.
Variant of   Lineberger   1, a surname of (Swiss) German or Alsatian origin.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Polly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Molly , established as an independent given name since the 18th century. The reason for the interchange of M- and P- is not clear; compare Peg .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Polly Lineberger was born in 1535, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Johann Michael Linberger, was 48 and her mother, Lady Eve Willis, was 45. She married John James Rankin. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1640, in her hometown, at the age of 105.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Polly Lineberger est née en 1535, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Johann Michael Linberger, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Eve Willis, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé John James Rankin. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1640, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 105 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Polly Linebergerが1535年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Johann Michael Linbergerは48歳，母Lady Eve Willisは45歳であった。John James Rankinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年に故郷で105歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Polly Lineberger(이)가 1535년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Michael Linberger(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eve Willis(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 John James Rankin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 그녀의 고향에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Polly Lineberger родилась в 1535 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Johann Michael Linberger было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eve Willis, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John James Rankin. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1640 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 105 лет.
